1 à 10: laquelle tu préfères? 🎞️
Dernière série photo de ce voyage à Komodo 🇮🇩
Je suis honnête avec toi, c’est une de mes plus belles expériences jusqu’ici dans ce magnifique pays: des paysages lunaires, des rencontres uniques et des moments de déconnexion totale 🤍
Je te partage un aperçu avec quelques anecdotes en caption sur chaque photo 📸

✨ C’est devenu notre mini-rituel du matin et aussi un de mes moments préférés: se lever tôt pour voir le sunrise sur le deck 

⛵️Pendant ce séjour, on a eu la chance d’être quasiment toujours seuls, c’était parfait pour déconnecter complètement. 

🐠 C’est une de mes rencontres préférées: les fameuses raies mantas. Je ne me rendais pas du tout compte à quel point elles sont gigantesques! 

🌿 J’avais aussi hâte de faire ce parc à ce moment de l’année parce que les paysages sont encore verts avant de tourner au orange. 

⚓️ Que ce soit sur l’eau ou sur terre, le mix était parfait entre découverte et repos. L’équipage nous a débarqué sur cette plage isolée où on a pu passer l’après-midi à bronzer. 

🐢 C’est toujours une experience unique de pouvoir nager avec une tortue: c’est incroyablement relaxant et on a eu la chance d’être avec elle un bon moment. 

⛰️ Voici un de mes points de vue préféré et aussi un des plus connus, l’île Padar. 

🌊 Fun fact: je pensais être malade en bateau mais au final ça a fait l’effet inverse, j’ai jamais aussi bien dormi! 

Notre dernier sunset, la photo parle d’elle-même je pense 🤍

The Art of Colourgrading

Usually my colour grades are really high effort. Many of the videos you see from me are a composite of 6+ power windows (masks) to amplify certain elements of the image. For instance I use a lot of circular power windows to depict soft sun rays against a hazy atomosphere.

I am developing a colourgrading pack + resources. 

Comment LUT to learn more.

#colorgrading #davinciresolve #editing

Uno de los momentos más increíbles que me ha regalado la naturaleza 🐋🌊💙

Ver ballenas saltando junto al barco una y otra vez fue algo difícil de describir. Impresiona ver cómo animales de tantas toneladas pueden moverse con esa fuerza y elegancia. Momentos que te recuerdan lo increíble que es la vida 🗺️💙
Sin duda, uno de los recuerdos más mágicos de mi vida

If you’re between 25–35 and starting to question your career, your income, or the direction your life is going… read this:

(In the meantime, comment “DREAM” and I’ll send you my free training where I share exactly how I made a living from my passion ❤️‍🔥)

There’s a moment no one really talks about, the moment where everything looks “fine”… but you realize it’s not what you actually want.

You followed the path that made sense, you did what you were supposed to do and you built something stable.

But somehow… it doesn’t feel like you, and the hardest part is not even knowing what you want instead. Just knowing this isn’t it.

I went through that phase too, and what changed everything for me wasn’t a big move overnight, it was a shift.
I stopped asking myself “what should I do?” and started asking myself these questions:

•  What kind of life do I actually want to wake up to every day?
•  What parts of my life am I willing to change to feel happier?
•  What passion or expertise do I have that would allow me to make more money while working fewer hours?
•  What do I already spend hours doing without realizing it?
•  What would I do if I knew I couldn’t fail?

Because at the end of the day… you’re not just building a career, you’re building a life that truly feels like you. Life is too short to spend it working a job you don’t like.

That one decision changed everything for me.

📌 If you also want to build something around your passion and make money from your phone, comment “DREAM” and I’ll send you my free training where I share the exact strategy I used, and how you can do the same 🥰👀

Hollywood has spent an insane amount of money trying to rescue Matt Damon.

Once you notice it, you can’t unsee it.

Across some of his most famous movies, Matt Damon is either stranded, isolated, trapped, or waiting for someone to bring him home.

Saving Private Ryan
Interstellar
The Martian
The Odyssey

Different movies. Different planets. Different missions.

But somehow, the story keeps coming back to the same idea:

Matt Damon is in trouble, and Hollywood needs a massive budget to save him.

The funny part is that these films have a combined production budget of hundreds of millions of dollars, which makes the pattern even more ridiculous.

It is not a criticism of the movies. Most of them are great.

It is just one of those weird Hollywood coincidences that turns into a perfect internet joke.

Matt Damon might be one of the most expensive people cinema has ever tried to bring home.
